description: Security logging hooks for Copilot Agent monitoring

args: $timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; $logEntry = "[$timestamp] SESSION_START - User: $env:USERNAME, Workspace: $env:PWD"; $logFile = '.github/logs/agent-sessions.log'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path (Split-Path $logFile) | Out-Null; Add-Content -Path $logFile -Value $logEntry

preToolUse.description: Log all tool executions before they run
args: $timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; $toolName = $env:COPILOT_TOOL_NAME; $toolArgs = $env:COPILOT_TOOL_ARGS; $logEntry = "[$timestamp] PRE_TOOL - Tool: $toolName, Args: $toolArgs"; $logFile = '.github/logs/tool-executions.log'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path (Split-Path $logFile) | Out-Null; Add-Content -Path $logFile -Value $logEntry

$timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; $toolName = $env:COPILOT_TOOL_NAME; $status = $env:COPILOT_TOOL_STATUS; $logEntry = "[$timestamp] POST_TOOL - Tool: $toolName, Status: $status"; $logFile = '.github/logs/tool-executions.log'; Add-Content -Path $logFile -Value $logEntry

preFileEdit.description: Log file edit attempts for security audit
args: $timestamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'; $filePath = $env:COPILOT_FILE_PATH; $logEntry = "[$timestamp] PRE_FILE_EDIT - File: $filePath, User: $env:USERNAME"; $logFile = '.github/logs/file-edits.log'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path (Split-Path $logFile) | Out-Null; Add-Content -Path $logFile -Value $logEntry
